description.zh-Hans: 将图像偏移图块大小的一部分并环绕边缘。主要用途：将接缝瑕疵暴露在中心以便手动或自动修复。这是「偏移+混合」无缝修复技术的前半部分。
description.en: Offsets the image by a fraction of the tile size and wraps around edges. Primary use: expose seam artifacts at the center for manual or automated repair. This is the first half of the "offset + blend" seamless repair technique.

triggers.zh-Hans: 偏移环绕, 平铺偏移, 循环偏移, 镜像偏移
triggers.en: offset wrap, tile offset, cyclic offset, mirror offset

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 偏移并环绕平铺纹理，使其无缝拼接。
exampleUsage.en: Offset and wrap a tiled texture for seamless tiling.
